msgDoc.msgLine: Partially matched data synchronization scheme found for CDC path from SrcObject to DestObject, crossing from SrcClockInfoList to DestClockInfoList

msgDesc.p: VC SpyGlass CDC reports this tag when a partially matched data synchronization scheme for CDC path from given source object to destination object is found in the design.

fields.field: ReasonInfoList: Reason info list
SrcObject: Q-pin/port of source signal
DestObject: Q-pin/port of destination signal
SrcClockInfoList: List of source clocks with corresponding domains
DestClockInfoList: List of destination clocks with corresponding domains
ConstraintInfoList: Constraint info list
SourceDriverSignals: List of source drivers
SrcObjectBitsUsed: Bits of source object participating in this violation
SrcObjectType: Source object type
SrcFileLine: File name and line number of source object. Possible sub-fields include:
SrcConstrInfo: Constraint info through which source is specified
DestObjectBitsUsed: Bits of destination object participating in this violation
DestObjectType: Destination object type
DstFileLine: File name and line number of destination object. Possible sub-fields include:
ViolationSAMType: Type of violation
ViaPointList: List of all the ViaPoints for a violation
SamSource: SAM boundary port at source side
SamDestination: SAM boundary port at destination side
IpBusSrc: IP bus port at source side
IpBusDst: IP bus port at destination side
DestConstrInfo: Constraint info through which destination is specified
CompositeSrcClockInfo: Composite source clock details. Possible sub-fields include:
AsyncClockPairInfoList: List of pair of all asynchronous source and destination clocks
CompositeDestClockInfo: Composite destination clock details. Possible sub-fields include:
CtrlPathList: List of control paths
SrcCtrlPathList: List of source control paths
EnableExprList: List of enable expressions
ContainerInstance: Containing instance
Module: Design Unit
CrossingCount: Bit level crossing count
FullyContainedViolation: Flagged violation is fully inside the abstracted module
BusCompressionData: Details about the bus compressed data. Possible sub-fields include:

subfields.subfield: StartPoint: First bit of compressed source bus
EndPoint: First bit of compressed destination bus
Mapping: Bit blasted mapping of compressed bus

fields.field: DynamicProperty: Property Info. Possible sub-fields include:
FileName: File Name
LineNumber: Line number
AssertionIdList: Assertion List corresponding to the violation

relatedcommands.field: configure_cdc_back_to_back_uds : This constraint is used to specify crossing sources so that CDC_SYNC_UDS_RESYNC will analyze them for back to back synchronizer usage.
configure_cdc_crossing : Enables various configurations on crossing generation, such as disable complex seq/primary ports as crossing start/end points or per domain limit of start points
configure_cdc_data_sync : It configures the data synchronizer detection by the tool
configure_cdc_internal_crossing : Enables Crossings on the source clock pin and the destination clock pin of the libcell provided
configure_cdc_nff_sync : It configures the multi-flop synchronizer detection by the tool
configure_cdc_static : Configures quasi-statics for CDC analysis
configure_cdc_userpath_data_sync : It configures the data synchronizer detection by the tool
configure_cdc_userpath_nff_sync : It configures the multi-flop synchronizer detection by the tool

configure_ip_block : User can specify the ip block in their design, which are used to configure the behavior/reporting of CDC, RDC and ResetAsync types of crossings present inside these blocks. By default, RDC crossings, which are present inside user specified blocks are reported as ignored.
configure_unconstrained_ports : Configures to model unconstrainted inputs and outputs of top, black-box modules, and lib modules
define_attribute : Defines an attribute with given name in the current scope.
set_cdc_ignore_path : Specified CDC path(s) will be ignored for CDC analysis purpose

relatedappvars.field: cdc_enable_merge_vector : Enables vector merging of CDC crossings
cdc_enable_sam_port_reporting : Enables or disables reporting of SAM port in TopSAM run violations
cdc_enable_splitbus_mapping : Enable bit blasted query for crossing when reporting is bus merged

relatedreasons.field: INVALID_BLOCKING_GATE : Control path cannot block data transfer by gating logic[Error]
SRC_SAME_AS_QUAL_SRC : Source of data crossing is same as source of control path qualifier[Error]
QUAL_CONVERGES_OTHER_SYNC_SRC : Qualifier converges with another synchronous source before gating logic[Error]
QUAL_CONVERGES_SAME_SRC : Qualifier converges with same source before gating logic[Error]
SRC_CONVERGES_QUAL_INSIDE_LOOP : Source converges with qualifier inside loop[Error]
QUAL_ON_MUX_DATAPIN : Control path reach MUX's data pins[Error]
NO_DSTDOM_SIGNAL_ON_MUX_DATAPINS : Only sources drive MUX data inputs; atleast one destination domain signal should drive a MUX data input[Error]
MUX_SELPIN_SRC : Same/another source drives MUX select input[Error]
QUAL_CONVERGES_ASYNC_SRC : Qualifier converges with another asynchronous source before gating logic[Error]
USER_IGNORED_TOOL_QUALIFIERS : Tool detected qualifiers for the crossing path ignored due to user constraint[Error]
ENABLE_EXPR_COMPLEX : Enable criteria generation is complex[Error]
ENABLE_EXPR_DOMAIN_SOURCE : Domain criteria not satisfied during enable detection:Source domain[Error]
POTENTIAL_SYNCRST_QUALIFIER : Potential sync reset synchronizer used as qualifier[Error]
CLOCK_PHASE_RELATION_NOT_SATISFIED : Phase requirement in clock relationship not satisfied[Error]
FUNCTIONALLY_UNBLOCKED : Data crossing source functionally non-blocked by qualifier[Error]
CDC_DATA_INTERNAL_CROSS_UNSYNCHRONIZED : Unsynchronized Datasync crossing by Internal Crossing constraint[Error]

whatNext.p: Refer to the related reason codes section and take any of the following steps based on the reason code reported.

Check the presence of following logic which is considered as invalid and correct the same to make the tag to full match. The gating logic like XOR gate is considered as invalid. Replace the XOR with valid gating logic such as AND gate.
Modify the structure so that the source does not drive the MUX select pin.
Make sure the control qualifier goes to select pin of the MUX to make this tag as full match.
Make sure at least one destination domain signal should drive a MUX data input or driven by MUX output otherwise the crossing is incomplete without proper destination.

Source control logic should have different source than that of data crossing, same source of data crossing should not be merged with control crossing and it becomes invalid. Make sure that structure has separate source for data and control logic.

Check if the qualifier is able to block the source correctly or not. The blocking value depends on the gate used in convergence. If it is an AND gate, the blocking value will be 0 and if it is an OR gate, the blocking value is 1. If not correctly blocked, modify the code.

Check if qualifier is able to block the source correctly or not. The blocking value depends on the gate used in convergence. If it is an AND gate, the blocking value will be 0 and if it is an OR gate, the blocking value is 1. If not correctly blocked, modify the code.
To fix this violation, design should be modified such that qualifier loop is resolved.
